headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热点
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续霸榜，《鬼上车》《龙族》紧随其后。本周新片《福尔摩斯小姐3》《穿普拉达的女王2》备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but "Obsession" tops charts, followed by "Ghost Car" and "Dragon Clan." Anticipated new films this week include "Enola Holmes 3" and "The Devil Wears Prada 2."

industryHighlights.en: "Avatar: The Last Airbender" release date sparks buzz

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》预告片点击破亿
industryHighlights.en: "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" trailer hits 100M views
